ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user (e.g., Male/Female) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color (e.g., Cool, Neutral, Warm) */,
  "color_category" TEXT /* Category of the color (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "music_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each music genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the music genre (e.g., Rock, Hip hop, Folk/Traditional) */,
  "sub_genre" TEXT /* Sub-genre of the music (e.g., Alternative Rock, Rap) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beverages" (
  "beverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beverage */,
  "beverage_name" TEXT /* Name of the beverage (e.g., Vodka, Wine, Whiskey) */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Alcohol content in percentage */,
  "beverage_type" TEXT /* Type of beverage (e.g., beer, wine, spirits) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soft_drinks" (
  "soft_drink_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soft drink */,
  "soft_drink_name" TEXT /* Name of the soft drink (e.g., 7UP/Sprite, Coca Cola/Pepsi, Fanta) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the soft drink */,
  "sugar_content" REAL /* Sugar content in grams per serving */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soft_drink_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred color */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred music genre */,
  "beverage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred beverage */,
  "soft_drink_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred soft drink */,
  "preference_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was recorded */,
  "preference_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the preference (e.g., mild, strong) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_soft_drink_id FOREIGN KEY ("soft_drink_id") REFERENCES soft_drinks ("soft_drink_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_beverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("beverage_id") REFERENCES beverages ("beverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES music_genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user demographic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the user */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the user */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_demographics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "IP_address" TEXT /* IP address of the researcher */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic analysis, preference analysis) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
